Name: County
Definition: County in which the structure is located

Name: Culvert Condition
Definition: Grade given to a structure if it is a culvert

Name: Deck Condition
Definition: Grade giving to a structure's deck component

Name: Deck Width
Definition: Out-to-Out measurment of a structure

Name: Division
Definition: Division number assigned by the state government

Name: Feature Carried
Definition: Feature that runs along the top of the structure

Name: Feature Intersected
Definition: Feature that runs below the structure

Name: Google Maps Url
Definition: Google maps link to the location of the structure

Name: Latitude
Definition: Latitude componente of the coordinate

Name: Longitude
Definition: Longitude component of the coordinate

Name: Parallel Structure
Definition: The side in which the structure is located if there is another structure parellel to it

Name: Structure Length
Definition: Length measurement of structure

Name: Structure Number
Definition: Unique Identification of structure
Contraints: Must be 6 digits with leading zeros

Name: Structure Type
Definition: Type of structure
Contraints: Bridge / Culvert / Pipe / Tunnel / Pedestrian Walkway

Name: Substructure
Definition: Description of structure's substructure component

Name: Substructure Condition
Definition: Grade given to a structure's substructure components

Name: Superstructure
Definition: Description of structure's superstructure component

Name: Superstructure Condition
Definition: Grade given to a structure's superstructure components

Name: Year Built
Definition: Year structure was originally constructed

Name: Year Reconstructed
Definition: Year structure was reconstru
